innateAbility.name: Solid Core
innateAbility.description: The Solid Core causes knockback sources to be less effective on Magnus and grants him slow resistance bonus.

abilities.name: Shockwave
abilities.description: Sends out a wave of force, damaging enemy units in a line, while knocking them toward Magnus and slowing them for a brief moment.

abilities.name: Empower
abilities.description: Grants the affected attack damage bonus for the duration.Additionally grants cleave damage if the affected allied unit is a melee unit.

abilities.name: Skewer
abilities.description: Rushes forward, damages, and drags all affected enemy heroes along the way.Applies a movement speed slow to affected enemy heroes at the destination.

abilities.name: Horn Toss
abilities.description: Tosses any enemy units in front of Magnus, launching them upward and to his rear.Applies a stun and deals damage to all affected enemy units upon landing.

abilities.name: Reverse Polarity
abilities.description: Offensively teleports all affected enemy units in front of Magnus within the radius, while damaging and stunning affected units.

talents.right: +14 All Attributes per Reverse Polarity Hero Hit
